title: The AI Future: Pathways and Ethical Checkpoints
description: A flowchart illustrating potential trajectories for near-future AI development, highlighting key decision points and their ethical and policy implications.
relationships: Pathways branch from 'Current AI Capabilities' based on the application of 'Policy Levers & Ethical Safeguards'. The 'Accelerated' pathway, without sufficient safeguards, leads to 'Misaligned & Disruptive' outcomes. The 'Controlled' pathway, guided by robust safeguards, leads to 'Beneficial & Augmentative' outcomes.
